faqs.question: Does Potti Sriramulu College Of Engineering And Technology provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Potti Sriramulu College Of Engineering And Technology has been rated 3.4 on placements on the basis of 81 reviews done by students.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 424 students were admitted at Potti Sriramulu College Of Engineering And Technology and 300 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 300 students 231 were placed with median salary of INR 300000 and 9 students opted for higher studies. A total of 387 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Potti Sriramulu College Of Engineering And Technologyand 376 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 376 students 358 were placed with median salary of INR 360000 and 9 students opted for higher studies.

Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking for the right college for your higher education, this can be a good option.

content.Placements: JCD Vidyapeeth College provides various kinds of job placement opportunities to the students, with job packages ranging from around 2 lakhs per annum to 4 lakhs per annum. The last top companies to visit our college were Tata Motors, Hyundai, Maruti Suzuki, Aditya Birla, etc.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to facilities and infrastructure, JCD Vidyapeeth College is quite wonderful. The buildings are well-maintained, and facilities like food, Wi-Fi, canteen, labs, and the library are available for every student.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dental college is a good and helpful if you are looking for BDS.

content.Placements: 85 students were placed. No package is provided yet. Stipends is provided to interns. No companies visit the campus for recruitments. 100% internship is guaranteed to the students. Stipend is a little bit low but it's okay. PG section is also available. Not only BDS, MS also available.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi is available in the college. Labs are available. AC is non working. Library is a nice place. Hostel is not good. Mess food is just average. No generator service is provided at the time of power cut. Gym is there. Park is there. Strictness is there. You can't exit the campus, if you are residing in girl's hostel.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jan Nayak Ch.Devi Lal Vidyapeeth - JCDV.

content.Placements: In our course there are a total of 100 seats are available and almost all seats are filled by the counseling conducted by PGIMS, Rohtak. The highest salary package offered to students is 16 LPA -18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. Generally, in dentistry, students are self-employed in their hospitals or join popular dentist clinics. The topmost role offered in our course is a dentist.
content.Infrastructure: In our classrooms, we have both screen projectors, as well as green boards so that students can clear doubts as per their needs. Teachers used to make diagrams in an easy way and give us a clear version of the topic they are going to teach as well. We have labs with sufficient equipment so that no student lacks behind in case of practical work. Our library is a room of knowledge where we can find the same subject books with different writers according to our preference.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college environment, staff members, and teachers.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students are from Sirsa city, and 10% of students are from villages. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. About 30% of students from our course got an internship. Infosys company visit our college for placements. A top role is offered by JCD Vidyapeeth.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a good Wi-Fi facility in hostels, but average in the library. Facilities like sitting places and furniture are good as expected. The food available in the canteen and hostel is good. It also provides good medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is for acquiring good knowledge with very good staff members and faculty members.

content.Placements: I am a student of JCD dental college currently in 3rd year. I have good knowledge experience from here. Our batch is of 2018, and we are a batch of 55 students. As an undergraduate course, in the medical stream, we have many advantages due to the knowledge we are gaining in college.
content.Infrastructure: All the departments are available with well-developed equipment, and all the basic and necessary needs are fulfilled. We get very good food and medical facilities here. The campus has its own shooting range, along with basketball ground, football ground, cricket ground and a few parks to keep students healthy.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

library.description:
Gulbarga University Central library is Wi-Fi enabled and is known for it collection of rare books. 

It has a collection of 2,27,831 books, subscribes 654 scientific journals, 16 CD-ROM databases, 5800 dissertation/theses and technical reports and has access to 12,000+ e-journals through UGC-INFONET e-resources and equipped with virtual reference access through QuestionPoint Service, OCLC-USA. Library also equipped with 150 computer systems and three main servers.
 
Central library has been awarded Dr. Padhya Best University Library Award in 2007 by Indian Library Association, New Delhi and was recipient of eINDIA's” 'Best ICT Enabled University' in 2011.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Unique College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 2 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My golden days and moments.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very clean and in good condition. The Chemistry lab and Physics lab are big, and students are comfortable in the labs. Classrooms are cleaned every day, and the college campus has good infrastructure. The library provides a new message to learn every day, and the canteen offers food and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Loyala First Grade Degree CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is the best in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of this college is high adorable the infrastructure is very good this college also provides labs Wi-Fi for the students and faculty the classrooms are fully furnished and air conditioning are available the hostel of this college are very big and it Maintain the clean environment this college canteen and mesh halls are very big and the food of both these places are suitable for eating for both faculty and students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Karnataka Arts Science and Commerce Degree CollegeReviewed on 9 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Karnataka Arts and Science College. It has a good interest, infrastructure, classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi facility. Its surroundings and the canteen are good. There are too many trees like green leaves, green trees, and the quality of food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Gulbarga University is the best university in Kalyan, Karnataka.
reviews.review_text: The best lab facilities are available. There is the best smart board in our university. The college has a new building, and there is good infrastructure. The best lab facilities are available. The classroom has AC, and the library is the best with lots of books. The hostel facilities are available and provide a bed. The quality food is available. The mess and canteen also provide good quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Karnataka Arts Science and Commerce Degree CollegeReviewed on 23 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college offers a degree but lacks real-world, industry-level training for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college library plays one of the turning points for every student, where we can get all study materials. There are various kinds of books available in the library, and Wi-Fi is also available for students. When we talk about the canteen, items like rice, samosa, and pakodi are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Channabasaveshwar Gurukul Science Degree CollegeReviewed on 26 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Channabasaveshwar Gurukul Science Degree College.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is no Wi-Fi facility for students. Classrooms and labs are good and maintained clean. We have a good library. Hostels are good for girls. For boys, hostels are not that good and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of lectures and the environment of college.
reviews.review_text: Facility wise the college was amazing there is no any excuses about that. Absolutely dissatisfied with the hostel environment and hostel food. The food was not good at all but there is no any way to get rid of this. We have to eat that food only. Library of our college was quite good.

reviews.review_heading: My happy study in this college.
reviews.review_text: Even though the buildings are old, the ambiance of this college is really good. They keep the surroundings clean and neat. Hostels are located outside the campus. The food in the mess is acceptable and manageable. There are very good canteens inside the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Gauhati University Post Graduate Centre, BidarReviewed on 30 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best course of Gauhati university.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a 3-story college with a big gate. The rooms in our department are quite big. And every department has good Wi-Fi. If a student's home is far away, he can stay in a hostel that is clean and within budget. And very good-quality food is available in hostels.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Gauhati University Post Graduate Centre, BidarReviewed on 19 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: My college is good with best teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the University is good. Our department is on the 3rd floor and more facilities are provided. We have Wi-Fi facilities in the classroom and labs. The library has more books, just like everyone else. Classrooms have projectors but not AC, which is a major drawback because the temperature is now too high. The hostel facilities are good and there are many more, like good food in the mess and well-played games on campus. We have a good team, and we have won many championships.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Gauhati University Post Graduate Centre, BidarReviewed on 19 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the good placement.
reviews.review_text: All facilities, sir, are given to students, such as Wi-Fi on campus and Wi-Fi facilities in the lab and hostel. Medical facilities are given to students, and classrooms are always clean. Hostel facilities like good food in a mess, but canteen food is tasty but costly.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gulbarga University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available at this college for our course was good. Wi-Fi, labs, library, hostel, canteen, big classrooms, etc., facilities were given to the students in our college. The quality of these offered facilities was average. The hostel of the college was located near the campus. Sports and other necessary facilities were also given to the students.

reviews.review_heading: My good experience at Gulbarga college.
reviews.review_text: This college has the best classrooms with well-designed interiors. The hostels are located near the college itself. A huge library is present on campus. There are no good canteens at the college. This college gives the utmost importance to sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Success Degree CollegeReviewed on 19 Feb 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements in MNC companies, with a good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing and it motivates us to do a good job. The food quality in our college is decent, leading to a huge rush in the canteen. Medical facilities are good. In our college, we have a sports day where everyone participates in various games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Karnataka Arts Science and Commerce Degree CollegeReviewed on 28 Feb 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided very good facilities and infrastructure for all departments. The practical labs were very good. Our college had a very huge library with a good environment. The hostel was good and was very far from our college.

reviews.review_text: The classroom is quite good, but the facility of benches is poor, and the library is good, but in medical facilities are not available at all. Here, Wi-Fi is only available for the laptops with connection with only the near-by servers which means a poor connection. Also, sports and games facility is available for those who have a leader in college only. Otherwise, no chance to participate.

The college is good in terms of classrooms, library and labs. It is very much disciplined with good faculty. Cons are lacking of appropriate hostel and is situated very far from the market. Low placement rates are of little concern alongside preference of local students over outsiders. It has an educated teaching staff and there is no unprofessional or greedy staff.
